name: Starlight Rider Faceplate

desc.1: The Crimson Knight says, "Carrying out the justice in my heart!"
desc.2: The Amber Knight says, "Dealing with each sin in this world!"
desc.3: The Verdant Knight says, "Protecting everyone's hope!"
desc.4: So what is a knight, in the end? The advanced tactical construct suddenly falls into serious thought over this profound question, no different from the philosophers who have long pondered the ultimate meaning of existence.
desc.5: Regrettably, this great and noble meditation on chivalric aesthetics is cut short in under ten seconds by an unceremonious interruption from a companion.
desc.6: "Billy, you've watched 'Starlight Knight: A Knight's Proof' a hundred times already. So what even is the proof?"
desc.7: "I'll know when I've watched it another hundred times!"
desc.8: — Two people arguing over the remote at the Cunning Hares' base.

desc2: Equip to increase Rupture Agents' combat capabilities
desc3: The proof of being a knight is within your grasp.
phaseDescs: Increases CRIT Rate by <ct color=#2BAD00>20%</ct>. When the equipper launches a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Sheer DMG</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>10%</ct>, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

Increases CRIT Rate by <ct color=#2BAD00>23%</ct>. When the equipper launches a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Sheer DMG</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>11.5%</ct>, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

Increases CRIT Rate by <ct color=#2BAD00>26%</ct>. When the equipper launches a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Sheer DMG</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>13%</ct>, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

Increases CRIT Rate by <ct color=#2BAD00>29%</ct>. When the equipper launches a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Sheer DMG</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>14.5%</ct>, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

Increases CRIT Rate by <ct color=#2BAD00>32%</ct>. When the equipper launches a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, their <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Sheer DMG</ct> increases by <ct color=#2BAD00>16%</ct>, stacking up to 2 times and lasting 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
